components.name: Kinesis provisioned shards
components.note: All 120 shards are charged for one full-hour quantum although the stream existed for under three minutes.

components.name: three Network Load Balancers
components.note: All three template NLBs are charged for one full-hour quantum.

components.name: idle NLB capacity allowance
components.note: One NLCU-hour per NLB is reserved despite no workload traffic.

components.name: single NAT gateway
components.note: The partial NAT gateway hour is rounded up.

components.name: NAT data allowance
components.note: Control-plane traffic allowance; no workload ran.

components.name: public IPv4 address
components.note: One NAT Elastic IP is charged for one full-hour quantum.

components.name: Secrets Manager storage
components.note: One secret is conservatively charged for a full day.

components.name: ECR image storage
components.note: Three one-GiB image allowances are charged for a full day.

components.name: DynamoDB storage
components.note: Three empty control tables receive a full-day storage allowance.

components.name: DynamoDB control reads
components.note: No data workload ran; this is a control-plane allowance.

components.name: DynamoDB control writes
components.note: No data workload ran; this is a control-plane allowance.

components.name: S3 storage
components.note: Two empty buckets receive the full successful-run storage allowance for one day.

components.name: CloudWatch log ingestion allowance
components.note: No ECS hosts started; a small control-plane margin is retained.

components.name: Cost Explorer query
components.note: One delayed tag-attribution query was executed.

components.name: evidence and transfer reserve
components.note: Preserves the original model's unmodeled evidence and transfer reserve.

components.name: failure-path reserve
components.note: Covers delayed billing and rollback uncertainty.

observedCostDisposition: delayed evidence; not used as a zero-cost assumption
roundingPolicy: round the evidence-backed failure-path model up to the next whole USD
